arts.ttl: Sporting make familiar Ruben Amorim mistake in Champions League clash with Arsenal
arts.sum: Sporting hosted Arsenal in the Champions League on Tuesday evening in what was their first European game since the exit of Ruben Amorim, who has taken charge of Manchester United

arts.ttl: Sporting Lisbon fans cause chaos with fireworks during Arsenal clash in Champions League - as they explode over David Raya's penalty area
arts.sum: The disgruntled home supporters launched the pyrotechnics after around 25 minutes with their side trailing 2-0 at the Estadio Jose Alvalade.

arts.ttl: 'Arsenal fans once made me cry - I'm now a cult hero at the Emirates'
arts.sum: Emmanuel Eboue was once reduced to tears by Arsenal fans but he's fondly remembered as a cult hero at the Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand tells Viktor Gyokeres to reunite with Ruben Amorim at Man United - as he insists the Sporting Lisbon striker isn't in 'the top bracket' yet
arts.sum: The Swede, who has scored 23 goals in 18 games for Sporting this season, has become one of Europe's most sought after stars following his displays in Portugal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 3-0 Nottingham Forest: Mikel Arteta selection gamble paid off in "best performance of the season"
arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts labels the Gunners' 3-0 success over Nottingham Forest their "best performance" of the season and hails Mikel Arteta's unexpected changes.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim steps up Viktor Gyokeres chase as Man Utd scout three players
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim wants to reunite with Viktor Gyokeres at Manchester United, but the Portuguese coach would also like to snare two other top players from Sporting Lisbon

arts.ttl: Ex-ref brands Dermot Gallagher 'PGMOL puppet' after Liverpool decision amid Arsenal title race
arts.sum: Dermot Gallagher has been slammed as "the PGMOL's puppet" by ex-referee Keith Hackett after defending Samuel Barrott's decision to deny Southampton a penalty against Liverpool on Sunday. Speaking as a refereeing pundit on Sky Sports, ex-official Gallagher argued that Barrott had already blown his whistle prior to Kelleher's challenge for Armstrong pulling on the shirt of Conor Bradley.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea 'handed Barcelona problem' in pursuit of Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly deal a blow to Arsenal and Chelsea's hopes of signing Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: Arsenal given huge Raheem Sterling decision after January transfer wildcard option emerges
arts.sum: Reports this week have claimed that Brighton and Hove Albion striker Evan Ferguson is available on loan after being unable to get game time under Fabian Hurzeler. Sterling's loan move from London rivals Chelsea came about to improve Arteta's options in attack.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres latest: Arsenal & Man Utd receive NIGHTMARE news
arts.sum: Real Madrid have reportedly joined the race to sign Sporting CP forward Viktor Gyokeres following news that Erling Haaland is set to extend his Manchester City contract. In a bid to beat both Arsenal and Man Utd to Gyokeres next year, Real Madrid are reportedly set to offer Sporting CP the chance to sign Endrick on a season-long loan deal.
